metadata.purpose: Section-routing anchor words extracted directly from the 2026 AHA/ASA AIS Guideline text. Used to route a user query to the correct guideline section(s) based on clinical vocabulary that appears in each section.
metadata.usage: When a clinician asks a question, match anchor words in their query against this map to identify which section(s) to search. A query may match multiple sections.
metadata.source: 2026 Guideline for the Early Management of Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke (AHA/ASA)

categories.trials: Named clinical trials referenced in the section
categories.metrics: Structured thresholds, ranges, time windows, dosing — each entry has term + value/range
